title: 1B Alpine View Retreat
description: Rates from AU$500 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to 1B Alpine View Retreat! Welcome to 1B Alpine View Retreat, the epitome of luxury and comfort in Jindabyne. This stunning brand new duplex is designed to cater specifically to friends and families seeking a truly memorable holiday experience. With its opulent and meticulously designed interior, this property offers a level of charm and elegance that is unparalleled. As you step into the grandeur of the ground floor, you'll be captivated by the Live Edge locally sourced feature wooden bench. A spacious double garage equipped with a drying cupboard provides secure storage for your vehicles and outdoor equipment. On this level, you'll also discover three exquisitely appointed bedrooms. The first bedroom boasts two king single beds and large windows that invite the natural light to cascade in and ample cupboard space ensures all your belongings can be neatly stored. Bedroom 2 and Bedroom 3 feature high-quality queen beds, guaranteeing a restful sleep for everyone. A shared stylish bathroom awaits, complete with a shower and large bath, while a separate toilet and laundry adds convenience. A cosy sitting room and a lovely courtyard offer additional spaces where you can relax and unwind. Moving upstairs, an industrial-style staircase and feature rustic brick wall guide your ascent. The pendant ball light above creates a captivating ambience as you venture into the open plan layout. Here, a modern kitchen, open plan living area, and a stylish round 8-seater dining area seamlessly combine to create an inviting atmosphere. Off the kitchen, a spacious balcony with expansive views of the mountains awaits, providing a perfect spot to relax and enjoy the beautiful sunsets. This setup is ideal for socialising, preparing meals, and enjoying shared moments with loved ones. A second sitting area on this level offers additional space for relaxing and unwinding, allowing you to take in the views from multiple vantage points. The magnificent mountain views can be admired from the comfortable furnishings in the lounge area, framed by a large picture window. Entertainment is well-catered for with a large smart TV and fast WiFi connection (500Mbps). A convenient powder room adds to the ease of use in this area. The spacious master bedroom awaits, complete with a king bed, walk-in robe, and a private ensuite. Access to yet another deck with a quaint sitting area allows you to enjoy more of the views on offer. Equipped with air conditioning in the upstairs areas, this property ensures a cool and refreshing atmosphere during the warm weather, allowing you to relax and unwind in absolute comfort. During the colder months the hydronic heating system throughout ensures a cozy warmth that will keep you snug and content. For outdoor enthusiasts, this property offers additional amenities such as the outdoor bike wash station which provides a secure and practical space for cleaning and maintaining your bikes, allowing you to make the most of the thrilling outdoor adventures in the area. Immerse yourself in the modern design that characterises this remarkable duplex. With excellent amenities and a convenient location, this property is the perfect choice for your holiday. Indulge in luxury and comfort as you soak in the breath taking mountain views that surround you. Every aspect of this meticulously designed property has been carefully considered to create an unforgettable experience for you and your loved ones. Book your stay now and prepare to be captivated by the charm and elegance of this exceptional retreat. 1B Alpine View Retreat can accommodate up to 8 guests and does not allow pets. Please note, the property is situated in a developing area, and construction may be taking place on some neighbouring properties. Please note that EV charging is not permitted at the property. Use of power outlets for charging electric vehicles is strictly prohibited and may result in additional fees. Public charging stations nearby (Jindabyne): NRMA Fast Charger – Kosciuszko Rd near the Visitor Centre, Lake Jindabyne Hotel – 48 Kosciuszko Rd, BP pulse Station – 8 Kosciuszko Rd. Sustainability practices include: Rainwater collected, recycling bins provided, taps and showers are water-efficient, towel reuse in place, walls and ceilings insulated, double glazed windows, green spaces on property, solar panels, hydronic heating. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-63635

title: 2/24 Bogong

Three generous bedrooms, a second toilet, and ample parking make it a practical and comfortable base for your Snowy Mountains getaway. Features: • Expansive outdoor entertaining area with lake and mountain views • Three spacious bedrooms • Renovated kitchen and bathroom • Additional toilet with washbasin • Air conditioning • Single garage with generous storage and laundry to the rear • Additional carport parking • Quiet complex of only three residences • Easy walk to Jindabyne town centre Please note: The property does NOT have WiFi . The property photos shown may include additional styling items used for sales photography which are not included within the holiday rental. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-93131

title: 3A Kunama
description: Rates from AU$470 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to 3A Kunama! Located in the beautiful township of Berridale, this home is new to our holiday property portfolio and has been thoughtfully and artistically decorated. 3A Kunama is private and is just a short stroll the local shops and a 25 minute drive to Jindabyne and 60 mins to Thredbo and Perisher. This large home sleeps 10 people in 4 bedrooms with 3 bathrooms. The property offers a double lock up garage with internal access to the house. The entryway opens up to the sun filled open plan living area with its oversized lounge to relax on and a spacious 8 seater wooden dining table which has access to the fenced back yard. The open concept modern kitchen has all that you will need to enjoy your country getaway with: -Large fridge -Nespresso Coffee Machine -Microwave -Electric Cook Top -Electric Oven -Toaster and Kettle -Fully equipped with crockery, cutlery, glassware and pots/pans -Ample storage The Large Flat Screen TV is central to the whole loungeroom, so can be enjoyed from multiple vantage points in the room, while the reverse cycle air-conditioning unit provides a comfortable room temperature in the living/dining/kitchen areas for Winter and Summer guests alike. This spacious home has 4 well equipped bedrooms with ample storage and electric panel heaters for the Winter months. The Bedding Configuration for this property is: -Bedroom 1 has 2 single beds with a built in wardrobe and views of the back yard. -Bedroom 2 has a queen bed with a built in wardrobe and views to the front garden. -Bedroom 3 and 4 both boast a queen and a single bed, both with ensuites, consisting of shower, toilet and vanity. One room has access to the back yard, whilst the other has a large bay window to let the natural light shine in. All of this is down a long hallway with the spacious family bathroom closest to the living area, which offers a large shower, vanity and toilet. Across the way is the well-equipped Laundry with: -Large Washing Machine -Clothes Dryer -Laundry Sink -Spacious storage -Door to the grassed back yard. Sustainability practices include: Recycling bins provided, taps and showers are water-efficient, towel reuse in place, walls and ceilings insulated, green spaces on property. Please note: Not Pet Friendly STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-83623

title: Aarlaur 2
description: Rates from AU$287 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Tucked into the heart of Jindabyne, Aarlaur 2 is a cosy mountain-style chalet designed for slow mornings, crisp alpine air, and evenings by the firepit. Perfect for two couples, this inviting retreat blends rustic charm with thoughtful comfort—your ideal base for both adventure and unwinding. Inside, the ground floor welcomes you with a warm, open-plan living, dining and kitchen space, where timber accents and soft textures create an easy, relaxed atmosphere. After a day on the slopes or exploring the lake, sink into the freestanding bath or gather outside around the firepit under a sky full of stars (just bring your own firewood). The chalet features two queen bedrooms—one conveniently located downstairs, while the upstairs retreat offers added privacy along with a second sitting area, a quiet library/study nook, and a private balcony. From here, take in sweeping views across Lake Jindabyne as the light shifts over the mountains. With two EV chargers available (pay-per-use) and all the essentials for a comfortable stay, Aarlaur 2 makes coming back just as rewarding as heading out. Whether you're chasing snow-filled days or a peaceful alpine escape, this is a place to settle in, switch off, and savour the season. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-48451

title: Acacia 2
description: Rates from AU$438 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Acacia 2 — a spacious alpine townhouse designed for relaxed Snowy Mountains escapes with family and friends. Set against the stunning backdrop of the Snowy Mountains, this comfortable and well-equipped townhouse offers the perfect base for year-round adventures, whether you’re visiting for winter snow trips or summer days by the lake. The open-plan living area is warm, welcoming, and ideal for gathering together after a day outdoors. Large windows and a west-facing balcony capture beautiful mountain views, creating the perfect spot for summer BBQs, sunset drinks, or cosy winter afternoons. The fully equipped kitchen includes a Nespresso coffee machine and everything needed for easy holiday meals, while the generous lounge and dining spaces comfortably accommodate extended families and groups. Designed for comfort in every season, Acacia 2 features reverse-cycle air conditioning, a gas fireplace for chilly alpine evenings, NBN Wi-Fi, and Foxtel (Austar) entertainment. Sleeping up to eight guests, the property includes three comfortable bedrooms, including a master with ensuite, along with a full bathroom, separate toilet, and laundry facilities for added convenience during longer stays. Winter guests will especially appreciate the dedicated drying room located beside the stairs, along with ski and snowboard storage at the front entry—making snow holidays easy and stress-free. Outside, the double undercover carport provides ample parking space, including enough room for a boat, ideal for guests visiting during the warmer months. Perfectly positioned to enjoy everything the Snowy Mountains region has to offer, guests can spend their days skiing, snowboarding, snowshoeing, and exploring the alpine backcountry in winter, or enjoy hiking, mountain biking, fishing, horse riding, and watersports on Lake Jindabyne throughout summer. Thoughtful sustainability features include rainwater collection, recycling facilities, water-efficient fittings, towel reuse initiatives, insulated walls and ceilings, and surrounding green spaces. Acacia 2 comfortably accommodates up to 8 guests. Please note: This property is not pet friendly. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-10498

title: Alpine Gables 8
description: Rates from AU$305 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Alpine Gables 8, a modern loft-style apartment conveniently located in the heart of Jindabyne. Positioned within the Alpine Gables complex, the apartment is directly across the road from Nuggets Crossing Shopping Centre, restaurants, cafés, bars, and just a short stroll to Lake Jindabyne. Recently renovated, the apartment offers comfortable and practical accommodation for couples, families, or small groups looking for an easy Snowy Mountains getaway. The loft-style layout features open-plan living with a modern kitchenette equipped with a mini fridge, microwave, air fryer oven, portable double hotplate, and everything needed for simple holiday meals. There is also a BBQ outside for guest use. The apartment includes a contemporary bathroom, comfortable living space, and modern furnishings throughout. Guests also have access to shared complex facilities including a gym, sauna, onsite parking and communal laundry with paid washing machines and dryers located within the building. One of the highlights of the location is the Brumby Bar & Grill, conveniently located within the same complex — perfect for dinner or a drink after a day exploring the Snowy Mountains. Whether you are visiting for skiing, mountain biking, hiking, fishing, or simply relaxing by the lake, Alpine Gables 8 provides a central and convenient base for your stay. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-89496

title: Alpine Mountain View 18

The space also includes a coffee table, ideal for indulging in a hot cup of tea or coffee while taking in stunning views of the surrounding mountains. The lounge area includes a plush L-shaped couch, a large flat-screen TV, and free WiFi, ensuring guests have all the comforts of home. From this upstairs apartment, guests can enjoy views of the lake and mountains. The complex offers a pool, which guests have access to throughout the summer months. The property also features off-street parking for two cars throughout your stay, providing peace of mind and convenience for guests. Whether you're here to enjoy the winter snow or summer sunshine, Alpine Mountain View 18 is the perfect base for your Jindabyne holiday. title: Alpine Mountain View 39

title: Astrid's at Central Park
description: Rates from AU$373 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Astrid's at Central Park! Astrid's at Central Park is the epitome of a wonderfully renovated top-floor 2-bedroom unit. Perfect for a family of five or two couples, it offers captivating views of the mountains and lake, making it an ideal place to stay when exploring the Snowy Mountains. The master bedroom features brand-new furnishings and carpets, with a wall-mounted smart TV, panel heater and queen bed. The en-suite bathroom has been thoughtfully renovated to include a toilet, vanity, and bath with an overhead shower. The second bedroom has also been updated and boasts a comfortable Tri Bunk, a single bed on top and a double on the base, with new furniture, carpets, and a wall-mounted panel heater. A combined bathroom/laundry services both the second bedroom and living area, including a shower, toilet, top loading washing machine, and a dryer. The open-plan living and dining area boasts brand new laminated floorboards, with a fully equipped kitchen, featuring a Bosch oven, induction cooktop, stainless steel dishwasher, full fridge, and coffee pod machine. Moreover, a six-seat dining table comfortably seats the group, opening up to a lovely leather lounge, matching ottoman, and a single armchair, which takes in both the mountain views and the wall-mounted smart TV. Astrid's at Central Park has all the necessary conveniences, including a wall-mounted reverse cycle air conditioner, WiFi, and a coffee machine. Plenty of storage for gear is available, including a bench seat with plenty of coat hooks and a rack for helmets. The complex offers a ski and bike storage room at ground level, while the unit has two allocated car spaces and is centrally located behind the Nuggets Crossing Shopping Centre. Astrid's at Central Park accommodates up to five people, does not allow pets and provides a comfortable and stylish base for your Snowy Mountains adventure. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-33194

title: Avalanche 3

title: Beloka 7

title: Black Diamond Retreat
description: Rates from AU$485 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Set in the peaceful surrounds of Tyrolean Village, Black Diamond Retreat is a thoughtfully designed escape where modern luxury meets alpine ease. Ideal for families and groups of friends, this stylish home balances high-end finishes with warm, welcoming spaces—perfect for relaxing after a day exploring the region. From arrival, the home makes an impression with its double carport, inviting mudroom entry, and interiors that are beautifully curated with designer furnishings and a soft, contemporary palette that creates an immediate sense of comfort. The main living level is centered around connection and comfort. A well-equipped kitchen features premium appliances, generous bench space, and an island for casual dining, flowing seamlessly into the open-plan living and dining area. Here, a gas fireplace and reverse-cycle air conditioning ensure year-round comfort, while a smart TV and in-ceiling Bluetooth speakers set the scene for relaxed evenings in. Step outside to the covered deck, where a BBQ and outdoor seating invite long meals overlooking Lake Jindabyne. Also on this level, the master suite offers a private retreat with a king bed, built-in robe, TV, and tranquil lake views. The ensuite is designed for indulgence, complete with underfloor heating, a spacious shower, and double vanity. A laundry with heated floors, washer, dryer, and ski boot drying facilities, along with a convenient powder room, adds to the home’s practicality. Downstairs, a second living area provides additional space to unwind, featuring a kitchenette and a pull-down Murphy bed for extra guests. Two further bedrooms—one with a queen bed and the other with two king singles—are complemented by a beautifully appointed main bathroom with a freestanding bath, separate shower, and underfloor heating. Sleeping up to 8 guests, with the following bedding configuration: Bedroom 1: King bed Bedroom 2: Queen bed Bedroom 3: Two king single beds Second living area: Queen Murphy bed Additional features include WiFi, panel heating in bedrooms, and a strict non-smoking policy inside and outside the entire property. Sustainability has been thoughtfully considered, with features such as solar panels, rainwater collection, double glazing, efficient water fixtures, and recycling facilities. Located just a short drive from Jindabyne’s shops, cafes, and restaurants, and within easy reach of the region’s key attractions, Black Diamond Retreat is perfectly positioned for both adventure and relaxation. Please note: The property is located in a developing area, and some neighbouring construction may be ongoing. Pets are not permitted. For extended stays (10+ nights) or New Year bookings, please enquire directly. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-14921

title: Bundilla 4
description: Rates from AU$420 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Kids will love the dedicated TV room, just off the main living area, giving everyone their own space to relax. Other amenities include complimentary WiFi, a K-FEE coffee machine (pods not provided), and two off-street parking spaces. Bundilla 4 is the perfect base for your alpine adventures – from skiing and snowboarding in winter to hiking, biking, fishing, and lake activities in the warmer months. Please note: This property is not pet friendly. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-5215

title: Deadwood Den - 1/50 Townsend Street Jindabyne
description: Rates from AU$399 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Deadwood Den! Welcome to Deadwood Den, a luxurious holiday rental apartment nestled in the heart of Jindabyne! This spacious 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom townhouse spans across 4 levels, offering ample space and comfort for your vacation retreat. Recently renovated to the highest standards, this townhouse exudes modern elegance and charm. As you enter, you'll be greeted by a well-appointed entry level featuring a drying cupboard, a cozy bedroom, and a sleek bathroom. The combined kitchen and dining area with gas heating seamlessly flows out onto a large south-facing deck, where you can indulge in breathtaking views of 'Pooh Bay' and the majestic dam wall. The middle level is dedicated to relaxation and entertainment, boasting a generous living and lounge area adorned with a slow combustion fireplace (complimentary limited supply of firewood provided), perfect for cozy evenings with loved ones. Step outside onto the north-facing deck to soak up the sun and relish in the tranquil surroundings. Ascending to the upper level, you'll discover the luxurious master suite, complete with its own bathroom and panoramic views of the serene Lake Jindabyne and picturesque mountains. Wake up to the sight of the sun casting its golden hues over the water, setting the tone for another day of adventure. The lower level offers a spacious third bedroom, providing privacy and comfort, with a sliding glass door leading to the undercover rear courtyard. Convenient parking is available right at your doorstep, featuring a carport with a Tesla EV charging station and an additional open parking space. Conveniently located within walking distance of the Town Centre shopping complex, Jindabyne Bowling Club, Lake Jindabyne, and the lakeside shared trail, our townhouse is ideally positioned for outdoor enthusiasts and those seeking an active lifestyle. Whether you're hitting the slopes in winter or exploring the myriad of outdoor activities in summer, this is the ultimate base for your alpine adventure. Escape to this holiday rental apartment and immerse yourself in the beauty and tranquility of Jindabyne, where every moment is an opportunity for unforgettable memories. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-66751

title: Dromaius 5

Dromaius 5 is a premium quality townhouse located in Jindabyne that offers a comfortable stay for up to eight people. With three bedrooms, two bathrooms and a spacious living area, this townhouse provides ample space for everyone. The bedrooms are well-appointed, with two queen-sized beds and a third room with two bunk beds, making it perfect for families or groups of friends. The townhouse also includes two private balconies with stunning views, as well as TVs in both queen rooms. The upstairs bathroom boasts a large corner spa, which is perfect for relaxing after a day of exploring the beautiful surroundings. The second bathroom offers a shower over bath, providing guests with all the amenities they need. The double lock-up garage with internal access and remote is perfect for storing bikes, boats, and skis and boards, making it ideal for year-round use. The townhouse also offers various amenities such as instantaneous hot water, WiFi, full laundry facilities, a coffee pod machine, a gas fireplace to keep guests warm during the winter and air conditions for the summer months. The spacious and fully equipped kitchen includes a microwave and dishwasher, making it easy to cook meals in the comfort of your own home. Enjoy the breathtaking views while grilling and dining on the expansive balcony with a covered entertainment area. Please be advised there may be some construction in progress in the surrounding areas due to ongoing development. Nevertheless, Dromaius 5 is a top-notch townhouse that guarantees a comfortable stay for families or friends looking to discover the stunning Jindabyne area. This property is 'Not Pet Friendly' STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-42345

title: Eliza Lee 3
description: Rates from AU$369 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Eliza Lee 3! Eliza Lee 3 is a spacious and comfortable self-contained apartment that is perfect for families and groups of friends. With three generously sized bedrooms, two bathrooms, and an open plan living area, this property offers ample space for everyone. The living area is bright and airy, with a fully equipped kitchen, dining area, and comfortable lounge area. The newly installed reverse cycle air conditioning ensures guests are comfortable all year round, while the large double lock-up garage with a spacious drying room and laundry is perfect for storing all your gear during your stay. Please note that the garage height is max: 200cm and the driveway is quite steep. With its perfect location, Eliza Lee is an ideal base for any alpine experience, whether it's during the winter or summer months. During the summer months, guests can enjoy water sports on Lake Jindabyne, trout fishing, horse riding, and mountain biking, as well as close proximity to some of the highest hiking trails in Australia. Meanwhile, during the winter, guests can enjoy easy access to some of the best skiing and snow-play activities in the Snowy Mountains, with Perisher and Thredbo resorts just a 30-minute drive away. With its prime location and comfortable amenities, Eliza Lee 3 is the perfect choice for families and friends looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay in the Snowy Mountains. This property is 'Not Pet Friendly' STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-5073-3

description: Rates from AU$465 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Frost Garden Retreat, a comfortable split-level apartment conveniently located close to the heart of Jindabyne and all the Snowy Mountains region has to offer. Set across two levels, the apartment features an open-plan kitchen, dining, and living area designed for easy and relaxed stays after a day exploring the region. All three bedrooms are generously sized and include built-in wardrobes, giving everyone space to settle in comfortably. Two bathrooms, a separate laundry, and undercover parking for two vehicles add practicality for families, groups, or longer stays. Whether you're visiting for snow season, mountain biking, lake adventures, or a relaxing alpine getaway, this fully furnished apartment places you within easy reach of Jindabyne’s shops, restaurants, lakefront, and year-round attractions. title: Grey Kangaroo
description: Rates from AU$360 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Grey Kangaroo! Grey Kangaroo is the perfect PET FRIENDLY property for families and friends looking for an alpine experience in the Snowy Mountains. With direct access to Lake Jindabyne and the surrounding foreshore, this property is ideal for furry friends to enjoy the fresh mountain air. The property boasts a spacious deck with a BBQ and outdoor table that is fully fenced to ensure the safety and security of your pets. The deck also affords wonderful views over Lake Jindabyne, making it the perfect spot to enjoy a meal with family and friends. Grey Kangaroo is centrally located and comprises of two bedrooms, two bathrooms, a spacious lounge/dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, internal laundry, Wi-Fi (connected to NBN), and off-street parking. The property also has a workroom that is perfect for ski/board storage and tuning during winter or a secure area for bikes, water skis, and kayaks during summer. The property is equipped with ducted heating and cooling, ensuring a comfortable stay in the Snowy Mountains. Guests can enjoy activities such as walks along the lake, fishing, water sports, and mountain biking throughout summer. Alternatively, it is a mere 30 minutes to the ski resorts of Perisher and Thredbo to enjoy skiing, snowboarding, snow-play, and back-country adventures throughout the winter months. Grey Kangaroo is a fantastic base for either a summer escape or a winter adventure in the Snowy Mountains. The carport clearance is 213cm, so please take note if you're driving a larger vehicle. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-41644

title: Horizons 216
description: Rates from AU$240 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Horizons 216 — your lakeside escape in the heart of Jindabyne. Perfectly positioned for comfort, convenience, and breathtaking scenery, this deluxe studio apartment is an ideal base for your next Jindabyne escape. Whether you're chasing powder in winter or enjoying lakeside adventures in the warmer months, this well-appointed retreat has everything you need for a relaxing stay. Designed to accommodate up to four guests, the apartment features a cosy bedroom alcove alongside a high-quality Koala sofa bed in the open-plan living area—perfect for ensuring a restful night’s sleep for everyone. The fully equipped kitchen, complete with a dishwasher, makes self-catering easy, while the bathroom includes laundry facilities for added convenience. Reverse-cycle air conditioning keeps the space comfortable year-round, so you can unwind in any season. Step out onto the north-facing balcony and soak up sweeping views across Lake Jindabyne and the surrounding mountains—the perfect spot for your morning coffee or a glass of wine at sunset. Guests can leave the car in the undercover parking and enjoy a short stroll to local shops, cafes, restaurants, and entertainment. The Horizons complex also offers fantastic shared amenities, including an indoor heated pool, tennis court, on-site restaurant, and bar—ideal for both relaxation and recreation during your stay. Please note that stair access is required to enter the apartment, and Wi-Fi is not available at this property. Proudly managed by Snowy Mountains Accommodation, Horizons 216 offers a seamless blend of comfort, location, and alpine charm. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-42713

title: Ibis on Lake Jindabyne
description: Rates from AU$370 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Ibis! This beautifully appointed lakeside retreat offers direct access to Lake Jindabyne and its scenic foreshore. Positioned to capture a stunning northerly aspect, the large deck showcases panoramic views of the lake and mountains—perfect for morning coffees, sunset drinks, or simply soaking in the serenity. This centrally located three-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment is ideal for families and groups seeking a balance of adventure and relaxation. The spacious open-plan lounge, dining, and kitchen area features a charming retro design with well-maintained original features, gas fireplace, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Whether you’re visiting in summer or winter, Ibis is a fantastic base for all your mountain adventures. In the warmer months, enjoy watersports, fishing, lakeside walks, or explore nearby mountain biking trails. In winter, you're just 30 minutes from the ski resorts of Perisher and Thredbo—making skiing, snowboarding, and snow-play easily accessible. Located central to the towns amenities, Ibis is just a short stroll from Nuggets Crossing Shopping Centre and the Town Centre shops, where you’ll find a great selection of cafés, restaurants, and retail stores. Just a stones throw way, the local pub offers hearty meals, live music, and stunning lake views—perfect for a relaxed night out. Designed for year-round comfort, Ibis features ducted reverse-cycle heating and cooling, plus a cosy gas fireplace for those chilly alpine evenings. The property also includes a dedicated drying/storage room—perfect for tuning skis, storing boards, or securing bikes—as well as off-street parking for one car. (NOTE-The carport clearance is 213cm, so please take note if you're driving a larger vehicle). Whether you're chasing snowy peaks or sunny lake days, Ibis is your perfect home away from home in the Snowy Mountains. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-67297

title: Jasper 4
description: Rates from AU$373 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Jasper 4! Jasper 4 is a well-appointed three-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit located in the heart of the Jindabyne town centre that has ample space for up to 6 people. Jasper 4 features a large open plan living area that is filled with natural light thanks to the large windows that offer stunning views of Lake Jindabyne. A balcony off the living area is a great spot to watch the world go by without leaving your accommodation. The living space has a large dining table big enough to fit the whole group and the wall mounted reverse cycle Air Conditioner will keep you comfortable all year round. Jasper 4 has two bathrooms, both with shower vanity and toilets that service the three bedrooms with Bedroom 1 and 2 on the entry lower level that utilise the jack and jill style bathroom and Bedroom 3 on the upper level which is serviced by the smaller upstairs bathroom. title: Jillamatong 14
description: Rates from AU$377 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Jillamatong 14! Jillamatong 14 is a well presented 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom holiday rental that is Pet friendly with a fully fenced yard and undercover areas sure to keep the 4 legged members of the family happy! With ample undercover storage and plenty of space to park the boat and leave the bikes, this property has all the outside space that some holiday properties may not offer and will make a family holiday that little bit easier for everyone. The fully appointed kitchen has a dishwasher, microwave , electric oven with Gas cook top , side by side fridge and freezer and a Pod Coffee machine.The dining area has a modern dining setting with buffet and seating for 7 . The lounge area has a comfortable 3 seat lounge and matching single seat recliners. The large flat screen Smart TV will satisfy the whole family and the Reverse cycle air conditioner provides a comfortable room temperature regardless of the outside weather. The living area leads out to the fenced yard with undercover deck and outdoor setting with a 4 burner flat top gas BBQ. The downstairs bedrooms and full family bathroom are also located on the ground level. Bedroom 1 has a queen size bed and built in Robe and Bedroom 2 has a Single bed and a fold up trundle bed as shown in photos. The family bathroom consists of a shower, vanity and toilet. At the base of the stairs there is a Laundry with a combined washing machine/ dryer with access door straight to the washing line. Stairs lead up to the open landing living area with a lounge, TV and study desk. The upstairs balcony is the perfect spot to catch the mountain views on the 2 seat outdoor setting. The master bedroom is an open plan suite with a king size bed and built in robe and the bathroom sits behind the half wall with a shower vanity, jetted tub and a separate toilet. Jillamatong 14 is a pet friendly, spacious family home both inside and out! With WiFi and Air Conditioning , two living areas inside and loads of undercover space outside we look forward to welcoming you to our home away from home! title: Khione 1
description: Rates from AU$485 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Khione 1 — a spacious and stylish alpine townhouse designed for unforgettable Snowy Mountains stays with family and friends. Set across two generous levels, this modern three-bedroom, three-bathroom retreat comfortably accommodates up to eleven guests, making it the perfect base for large families, multiple couples, or groups travelling together. Upstairs, the light-filled open-plan living area is warm, welcoming, and ideal for entertaining after a day exploring the mountains. The gourmet kitchen is fully equipped with quality appliances including a chef oven, gas cooktop, microwave, dishwasher, and double fridge/freezer, making group meals easy and enjoyable. Flowing seamlessly into the dining and lounge area, the space is designed for relaxed holiday living, complete with gas heating, free Wi-Fi, a 60" Smart HD TV, and soundbar for cosy nights in. Step out onto the balcony to enjoy the mountain air while cooking on the BBQ or unwinding with a drink after a day on the slopes. The upper level also includes two comfortable bedrooms, including a master with ensuite, as well as a main bathroom featuring a spa bath—perfect for soaking tired muscles after skiing or hiking. A quiet writing nook provides a handy space for remote work or planning the next day’s adventures. Downstairs, the third bedroom is ideal for kids or teenagers, featuring two tri-bunks, its own ensuite, electric heating, and a large 64" flat-screen TV, creating a separate space to relax and unwind. Additional features include a full laundry with washer and dryer, all bathrooms have underfloor heating, a private courtyard, a dedicated drying room with hanging space for ski gear, a double lock-up garage and internal entry for added convenience during winter stays. Located close to Jindabyne’s town centre and lake foreshore, Khione 1 places you within easy reach of everything the Snowy Mountains are famous for—from skiing and snowboarding, shops, cafes, restaurants, mountain biking, hiking, fishing, and water sports. Comfortable, well-equipped, and thoughtfully designed for groups, Khione 1 offers the perfect alpine escape in every season. STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-31685

description: Rates from AU$450 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Kickenback Chalet @ Lake Crackenback Resort! Kickenback chalet is thoughtfully created with individually handcrafted pieces of furniture, rich colours, and textures that reflect the stunning alpine region. With disabled access, the chalet's open-plan design features a large lounge area, dining suite, Wifi, fully equipped kitchen, two ensuite bathrooms (one with disabled access), and internal shared laundry. During winter, guests can relax by the gas fireplace after a day on the slopes or during warmer months, enjoy the outdoors and utilize the outdoor area & BBQ. Additionally, there is sensor-operated air-conditioning for year round comfort. The chalet is located in Crackenback Valley, situated on the Alpine Way between Thredbo and Jindabyne, with easy access to the Ski Tube, making getting to Perisher a mere 10-minute train ride. Kickenback Chalet is located within a resort, and guests can take advantage of many activities and on-site dining throughout their stay. Guests have access to restaurants, luxury spa, gym, tennis courts, indoor pool, sauna (please note pool, gym & sauna are closed for renovations from 28th April - 15th May 2026), and other outdoor activities, including golf, trout fishing, and even Segway tours. Please note that some activities may incur costs. Ideal for families or groups of friends, this accommodation is the perfect choice for those looking to enjoy an alpine experience with disabled access and many onsite amenities. If you have a larger family, why not book in conjunction with Kickenback Studio, which is the adjoining studio apartment that sleeps 3 people. Please note: Pets are not allowed. Sustainability practices include: Recycling bins provided, taps and showers are water-efficient, towel reuse in place, walls and ceilings insulated, double glazed windows, green spaces on property, helping create a comfortable and environmentally conscious stay. title: Lake Villavista
description: Rates from AU$605 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Lake Villavista! Immerse yourself in the ultimate holiday getaway at Lake Villavista, a serene and stunningly lavish holiday townhouse tucked away in the charming locale of East Jindabyne. Boasting unmatched landscape views of the pristine lake and majestic mountains, this holiday home is a haven for nature enthusiasts, adventure seekers and anyone longing for a tranquil retreat. This delightfully inviting property can comfortably accommodate up to 10 guests, making it the perfect escape for families and large groups. At this luxe property, spectacular views of Lake Jindabyne and the mountains adorn your horizon, providing a tranquil setting that soothes and inspires. Whether you're admiring the vista from the balcony, lounging in the living room, or whipping up a meal in the well-equipped kitchen, the sight of nature's grandeur never fails to mesmerise. Enjoy the coziness of four well-appointed bedrooms in this spacious home. Retreat to the sanctuary of your room, each offering plush bedding designed to provide you with a comfortable sleep. Three and a half elegant bathrooms are ready to wash away the day's fun, with one featuring a bathtub for a comforting soak. Laundry facilities, including a clothes dryer and washing machine, ensure that staying fresh throughout your holiday is hassle-free. Immerse yourself in the heart of this stunning home, where a refined chesterfield seating ensemble nestled by a gas fireplace awaits, offering an inviting atmosphere for cozy evening gatherings. Create gastronomic delights in the fully equipped kitchen boasting premium appliances, and enjoy your home-cooked meal in the spacious dining room, complete with stunning views. Step outside to the covered outdoor area which includes a gas BBQ, ready for family cook-outs amidst the striking landscape. Enjoy the comfortable outdoor lounge where you can soak in breathtaking vistas with your morning coffee. For moments of leisure, retire to the dedicated media room or enjoy the convenience of a separate wine bar in the kitchen area. Experience the ultimate comfort with amenities such as ducted air-conditioning and underfloor heating in the bathrooms. Additional features include a secure double lock-up garage with direct interior entry, a drying room for snow gear and a paddle board for guest enjoyment on the lake in Summer. There is a secure fenced rear-yard and undercover area, sure to keep the 4 legged members of the family happy! Nestled beside the waters edge and a stone's throw away from diverse local attractions, Lake Villavista promises an enchanting holiday experience. Unwind, recharge, and create unforgettable memories. Lake Villavista can accommodate up to 10 guests and allows pets. description: Rates from AU$314 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Lakeside Townhouse! Your perfect year-round getaway in the Snowy Mountains. This cosy two-bedroom accommodation is ideal for families or two couples looking for a peaceful setting with lake views. The open plan kitchen/dining/living area leads out to a balcony where you can sit back and take in the beautiful views. The kitchen is well-equipped with a dishwasher, double sink, coffee machine and fridge. Although there is no oven, the 4 burner cooktop and convection microwave is ample for cooking. The floor heating in the kitchen and bathroom, as well as electric heating in the bedrooms and living area, will keep you warm and comfortable during your stay. There is a large separate laundry located downstairs that incorporates drying room facilities with plenty of hanging space, a bench for boots and ski/board racks during winter or water ski and biking equipment during summer. Alternatively, it's a mere 30 minutes to the ski resorts of Perisher and Thredbo to enjoy all that winter brings. With its peaceful setting and convenient location, Lakeside Townhouse is the perfect base for your next Snowy Mountains adventure. Please note that Wifi is not available at this property. title: Les Perrieres Chalet at Crackenback
description: Rates from AU$480 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Les Perrieres Chalet! Les Perrieres Chalet is a family home which is now available for you and your family to share! . This impressive split-level chalet can now be your own holiday retreat in the Snowy Mountains. With woodland views from every room Le Perrieres will make you feel like you are in a secluded sanctuary away from the hustle and bustle. Take in the eclectic artwork throughout this stunning home which encompasses art pieces from canvas, wood, pottery and the impressive outdoor metal sculptures which will make your friends envious when they see your photos. This spacious Chalet offers fantastic views of Thredbo Valley from the open plan kitchen and living through to the balcony which offers a large outdoor dining area, BBQ and stunning metal eagle perching on the balconies edge. The Chef in the family need not be excluded from the group with a well equipped large entertainers kitchen that features an induction cooktop, full oven, microwave, large family size fridge & freezer and Pod coffee machine. Soak in the panoramic mountain views during all seasons and in the winter months enjoy the open fireplace in the living area, which will keep you toasty and warm. There are electric wall heaters in the bedrooms and second living area. For the warmer months there is ducted air conditioning in the living area to keep you cool. The upper bedroom wing includes the master bedroom with king bed, second bedroom with two single beds, extra living room/ study with TV that also accommodates the double sofa bed and the bathroom which offers a shower, bath & toilet. The ground floor of the chalet has access to a double garage and leading off this is the drying room, laundry and communal foyer (note laundry is shared with the studio). Located within walking distance to resort facilities, guests can take advantage of many activities and on-site dining throughout their stay. description: Rates from AU$610 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Les Perrieres Lodge is a spacious alpine home designed for families and groups who want to holiday together—without giving up their own space. Combining a chalet and self-contained studio, it’s the perfect setup for larger groups seeking both connection and privacy. Set across multiple levels, the heart of the home is the mid-level open-plan living, dining, and kitchen area, where large windows and a generous deck frame sweeping views up the Thredbo Valley. Whether you're sharing meals or relaxing together, this space is designed to bring everyone together. The entertainer’s kitchen ensures the cook is always part of the action, featuring an induction cooktop, full oven, microwave, large fridge and freezer, and a pod coffee machine for easy mornings. On the ground floor, guests have access to a double garage, along with a convenient drying room, laundry, and entry foyer—perfect for storing and drying ski gear after a day on the slopes. The self-contained studio adds an extra layer of flexibility, featuring a king bed, lounge area, ensuite, and kitchenette with bar fridge, microwave, single cooktop, and pod coffee machine—ideal for couples or those wanting a little extra privacy. Located in Crackenback along the Alpine Way between Thredbo and Jindabyne, the lodge is perfectly positioned for year-round adventure. The nearby Ski Tube provides quick and easy access to Perisher in just 10 minutes. Guests can also enjoy access to a range of premium on-site facilities, including restaurants, a day spa, gym, tennis courts, indoor pool, and sauna. title: Matilda
description: Rates from AU$403 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Matilda! Nestled in the heart of Jindabyne, 'Matilda' is a gorgeous home boasting comfortable furnishings and breath taking views of Lake Jindabyne. The house has been freshly painted and is fully self-contained, featuring three bedrooms, two bathrooms, and two private parking spaces. With the capacity to sleep nine guests comfortably, it is the perfect holiday home for families and friends seeking adventure or relaxation. The first bedroom features a queen bed, a walk-in robe, and an en suite, while the second bedroom has a queen bed and built-in robes. The third bedroom is perfect for children, with a tri bunk and a bunk bed. The fully equipped kitchen has everything you need, including a stove/oven, dishwasher, microwave, and walk-in pantry. The newly decorated open plan living/dining area features a new lounge and dining setting, making it the perfect place to relax and unwind. The gas heater and ceiling fans ensure a comfortable stay throughout all seasons. The floor to ceiling windows make the most of the stunning lake views, opening out to the wrap around deck. The full laundry is equipped with a washing machine, dryer, and an extra fridge, just in case. For family entertainment, the house is equipped with games, free WIFI, a digital television, video, and DVD player. BBQ facilities are located out back with a yard, perfect for enjoying the outdoors. Please note: The property is accessed via a steep angled driveway, which may require some caution when entering and exiting. Stair access is required for entry into the home, we can offer access to the stair lift if required for qualifying guests. Additionally, there is a private studio located underneath the house with its own separate entrance. 'Matilda' is just a short five-minute walk from Jindabyne Town Centre and a 30-minute drive to either ski resort. Whether it's a summer or winter holiday, 'Matilda' is the perfect property for your next family getaway. This property is 'Not Pet Friendly' STRA Permit ID: PID-STRA-6542

title: Mogul Rock

description: Rates from AU$308 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Parkwood 5 — your cosy alpine base in the heart of the Snowy Mountains. Set across three thoughtfully designed levels, this charming retreat blends comfort, practicality, and a touch of mountain luxury. Recently refreshed with new carpets and kitchen, it’s the perfect place to unwind after a day exploring the region—whether you're chasing powder in winter or sunshine in summer. The main living level invites you to relax and reconnect. An open-plan layout combines lounge, dining, and a fully equipped modern kitchen, making it easy to cook, share meals, and spend time together. Reverse-cycle air conditioning keeps things comfortable year-round, while the Smart TV is ready for you to watch your favourite Netflix shows. Step outside onto your balcony, fire up the Weber BBQ, and soak in the crisp mountain air and scenic surrounds. Upstairs, the second level offers a practical and welcoming space for families or groups. Here you’ll find a combined bathroom and full laundry, along with a cosy bedroom featuring both a bunk bed and tri-bunk—ideal for kids, friends, or families. The top level is your peaceful sanctuary. This loft-style master retreat features a plush king-sized bed, Smart TV, built-in storage, and a private ensuite complete with a corner spa and shower—perfect for easing tired muscles after a day on the slopes or trails. Designed with adventure in mind, Parkwood 5 includes tandem undercover parking and exclusive access to a private ski and bike storage room. With racks, a bike repair stand, heating, and ample drying space, your gear will stay organised, warm, and ready for the next outing. Location-wise, it doesn’t get much better. You’re just a short stroll from local cafes, restaurants, and shops, while the iconic ski resorts of Thredbo and Perisher are within an easy 40-minute drive. Whether you’re here for snow-filled days or alpine hikes and lake adventures, everything is within reach. Pack your bags, breathe in the mountain air, and settle into a stay that’s equal parts adventure and relaxation. Parkwood 5 is your home away from home in the Snowy Mountains. On the first level, you'll find a bright open-plan living and dining area, complete with a fully equipped kitchen. The living space flows seamlessly onto a balcony where you can enjoy the mountain views and cook a delicious barbecue. This level also features reverse cycle air conditioning to keep you cozy in any weather. The second level of Parkwood 6 boasts a combined bathroom with full laundry facilities, making it convenient for longer stays. Set across two levels, the home features four beautifully appointed bedrooms, including two queen beds, king single bunks, and two king single beds—offering flexible accommodation for a variety of group stays. Accessed via a quiet, narrow lane, Quigtoo Cottage enjoys a tucked -away position that adds to its sense of privacy while still being in the township of Berridale. The fenced backyard, backs onto a peaceful council reserve where Myack Creek Trail passes. You may find it hard to leave at all as the batilax property is surrounded by cottage-style gardens and fresh alpine air, Quigtoo Cottage is a peaceful destination in its own right—ideal for slowing down, reconnecting, and soaking up the beauty of the countryside. Lovingly renovated and restored with traditional building techniques while providing modern day living essentials with an open-plan layout, The Stone Cottage provides the perfect setting for intimate moments and shared memories. Upon entering, you'll be greeted by the inviting warmth of a slow combustion fire, creating a cozy ambiance that sets the stage for relaxation. The cottage sleeps 2 guests in a comfortable queen-sized bed, ensuring a restful night's sleep after a day of adventure in the surrounding wilderness. The kitchenette is thoughtfully equipped with everything you need to whip up a delicious meal for two. From a portable electric induction hotplate to an air fryer, convection microwave, and pod coffee machine, you'll find all the essentials at your fingertips. Plus, with the convenience of a dishwasher, cleanup is a breeze, allowing you to focus on enjoying your time together. For added convenience, a drying cupboard is available to keep your ski gear warm and dry, ready for your next alpine adventure. Floor heating throughout the cottage ensures your comfort even on chilly winter nights, while ceiling fans provide a refreshing breeze during the warmer months. Please note that there is NO TV at the property, inviting you to disconnect from the outside world and fully immerse yourself in the serenity of your surroundings. Instead, cozy up with a good book, engage in meaningful conversations, or simply savor the quiet moments shared with your loved one. Whether you're seeking a romantic weekend escape or a tranquil retreat in the mountains, or wish to a take a walk back in time with the first settlers, Mary & James McEvoy, by visiting the historic sites on the property – the foundations of the old Wollondibby Inn, the bathing area, the private historic cemetery and first woolshed in the area. The Stone Cottage at Wollondibby offers an idyllic haven where cherished memories are made. Sustainability practices include: Rainwater collected, recycling bins provided, taps and showers are water-efficient, towel reuse in place, walls and ceilings insulated, double glazed windows, green spaces on property. title: Torino 6 - Lake Jindabyne & Snowy Mountain Views and Ducted Air
description: Rates from AU$485 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Torino 6 offers comfortable, self-contained accommodation in a well-positioned complex on the higher side of Jindabyne, capturing beautiful views across the lake from multiple balconies. This three-storey townhouse sleeps up to 10 guests across four bedrooms and two bathrooms, making it an excellent choice for both summer getaways and winter ski trips. The split-level layout provides plenty of space for families or groups to spread out, with a generous open-plan living, dining and kitchen area that opens onto a large balcony overlooking the lake. Underfloor heating in the bathrooms and ducted air conditioning throughout ensure year-round comfort. The fully equipped kitchen includes a large fridge, oven and dishwasher, allowing guests to easily self-cater, while the BBQ on the main deck is perfect for relaxed outdoor meals. The property also features two TVs, three balconies, and a large corner spa bath, providing plenty of space to unwind after a day exploring the region. Additional conveniences include free Wi-Fi, a guest drying cupboard at the entry for ski gear, and a double lock-up garage for secure parking and storage. Located just a short walk from Jindabyne’s shops, cafés and restaurants, Torino 6 is a practical and comfortable base for enjoying everything the Snowy Mountains has to offer in every season. title: Tukidale Cottage
description: Rates from AU$740 per night. Final price depends on dates, guests and availability. Welcome to Tukidale Cottage! Situated on Alpine Way, this renovated farmhouse cottage offers guests easy access to various attractions and activities. Convenience is at your fingertips with the Skitube only a quick 10-minute drive away, making it a breeze to hit the slopes. In just 12 minutes, you can find yourself in the vibrant town of Jindabyne, where you can explore shops, dine at local restaurants, or enjoy recreational activities on Lake Jindabyne. For those seeking the adventure and beauty of Thredbo, it's a mere 20-minute drive from our cottage. Step inside our recently renovated cozy 3-bedroom 3-bathroom cottage and feel instantly at home. Its chalet-style design exudes warmth and comfort, creating the perfect retreat for couples or families with older children (please note that children under 10 are not permitted). The cottage offers a peaceful escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life, allowing you to relax and unwind in the tranquil Thredbo Valley. With a self-contained setup, you have the option to cater for yourselves in the well-equipped kitchen or join us for a delightful dinner at the nearby Crackenback Farm Restaurant and Bar, just a short walk away. Immerse yourself in the beautiful surroundings and indulge in the delectable offerings at the restaurant when it's open. There is even the option to arrange catered meals to the cottage. For those seeking a taste of local craftsmanship, the renowned Wild Brumby distillery is situated close by. Discover their unique selection of spirits and experience the passion and creativity that goes into each bottle. Whether you're seeking outdoor adventures, serene relaxation, or the thrill of exploring local attractions, Tukidale Cottage promises to be your perfect base in the Thredbo Valley. Book now and start creating unforgettable memories in this idyllic alpine retreat.
